All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

S

save() - Static method in class model.UserStorage
Saves all user data to disk.
Search - Class in controller
The Search controller handles all searching operations in the application.
Search() - Constructor for class controller.Search
 
Session - Class in model
A class used to stores information about the current user session in the Photos app.
Session() - Constructor for class model.Session
 
setCaption(String) - Method in class model.Photo
Updates the caption of the photo.
setCurrentAlbumName(String) - Static method in class model.Session
Sets the name of the album currently being viewed.
setCurrentPhoto(Photo) - Static method in class model.Session
Sets the currently selected photo.
setCurrentUser(String) - Static method in class model.Session
Sets the current user for the session and determines if the user is the admin.
setName(String) - Method in class model.Album
Renames this album
start(Stage) - Method in class app.Photos
Initializes the primary app stage, loads the login screen, sets the window title, and handles save data on close.
